site.title: MaLuDa — IT school in Batumi
site.description: Practical IT courses in Batumi. Python, Data Analysis, DevOps, AI and Vibe Coding. Live classes, small groups, real projects.
hero.headline: Start your IT career in Batumi
hero.subheadline: Launching soon. First event is free. Live classes in small groups — no slides, no theory for theory's sake.
hero.quiz_nudge: Not sure where to start? Take the 2-min readiness quiz
hero.supporting: No experience required. No card needed. Just the will to figure things out.
problem.p1: You've probably tried before. A YouTube playlist, a Udemy course. Maybe got through the first lessons, then life took over.
problem.p2: It isn't laziness. Learning alone is hard.
problem.p3: Nobody answers your question at 10pm. Nobody notices you stopped showing up. Nobody pulls you through the moment things stop making sense.
value.headline: A real school. Real people. Real results.
value.maluda.1: A teacher who answers your questions in real time
value.maluda.5: A structured path from zero to job
value.supporting: MaLuDa is the first IT school in Batumi. We teach skills that get hired, in small groups where no one gets left behind.
courses.headline: Five courses. Three tracks. Your path into IT.
courses.not_sure: Not sure which course to pick?
courses.not_sure_cta: Come to the free intro event
how.headline: How MaLuDa works
how.step1.title: Pick a course
how.step1.desc: Python+SQL, Data Analysis, DevOps, Vibe Coding or Claude Code Automation. Not sure? We'll help.
how.step2.title: Learn by doing
how.step2.desc: Attend live classes, work on real projects, get feedback from your teacher.
how.step3.title: Build a portfolio
how.step3.desc: Every course ends with a capstone project you can show employers.
how.step4.title: Join the community
how.step4.desc: Stay connected with cohort-mates and the MaLuDa community after graduation.
social.headline: We just launched. Here's why that's good.
social.point1.title: The smallest groups
social.point1.desc: Future cohorts will be bigger. Right now you get the most attention.
social.point2.title: Direct founder access
social.point2.desc: Martin teaches every course personally. That won't last forever.
social.point3.title: Shape the school
social.point3.desc: Your feedback literally builds MaLuDa. Tell us what works and what doesn't.
social.point4.title: Founding member status
social.point4.desc: Priority access to future courses, events, and mentorship.
social.quote: We're building Batumi's first IT school. This isn't a finished product — it's a beginning. The first cohort is you, and your voice will literally shape what MaLuDa becomes.
team.headline: Who's behind MaLuDa?
team.intro: MaLuDa was founded in Batumi by a team that believes IT education should be personal, practical, and accessible.
team.small: We're small on purpose. Small means we know your name, understand your goals, and actually care that you succeed.
faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
register.headline: Start here: free intro event
register.subheadline: Not ready to commit to a course? Come to the free event first. No strings attached.
register.event_title: "3 Pillars of IT: Data, Dev, AI"
register.event_location: Batumi, city center, near Europe Square
register.experience.1: How Data Analysis helps businesses decide
register.experience.3: AI in action: vibe coding & content generation
register.experience.5: Meet other people in Batumi who care about IT
register.spots: Seats limited by venue capacity. Registration takes 30 seconds.
footer.headline: Ready to start?
footer.text: Pick a course and change your career. Or come to the free event first.
form.name: Full name
form.source: How did you hear about us?
form.success: Done! We'll be in touch shortly.
form.error: Something went wrong. Try again or message us on Telegram.
